action.reasoning: Observation: Refinement model trained 5 epochs on MetricGAN+ output. CRN got PESQ=2.70, MetricGAN+ baseline=3.134. Need to evaluate refinement model. action.command: python -c "import torch; ckpt = torch.load('checkpoints/best_refine.pt', map_location='cpu', weights_only=False); print('Type:', ckpt.get('type')); print('Config:', ckpt.get('config')); print('Keys:', list(ckpt.keys()))"
